Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The logs show a set of cases with common steps OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK LB DP D Some cases skip labeling Some cases have multiple repetitions of IQC and AS combos some have multiple repetitions of RT and TST combos

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Sequence OR MS QS AS IQC AS TST Case 2 OR MS QS AS IQC AS TST Case 3 OR MS QS AS IQC IQC AS IQC AS TST Case 4 OR MS QS AS TST Case 5 OR MS QS AS IQC AS IQC AS TST RT TST RT TST PK LB DP D Thus we have two loops one loop for AS IQC the quality loop and one loop for TST RT the test loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: we can model the quality loop as loop_q OperatorPOWL operator LOOP children AS IQC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: semantics execute A then either exit or execute B then A again That matches after AS you either go to TST exit or go to IQC then AS again In case 4 they skip IQC entirely consistent with exit after first AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: loop_t OperatorPOWL operator LOOP children TST RT semantics execute A TST then either exit or execute B RT then A again That matches

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: labeling LB may be skipped so xor_label OperatorPOWL operator XOR children LB skip

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: overall process OR to MS to QS to quality loop to test loop to PK to label_xor to DP to D

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: root StrictPartialOrder nodes OR MS QS quality_loop test_loop PK label_xor DP D order OR MS MS QS QS quality_loop quality_loop test_loop test_loop PK PK label_xor label_xor DP DP D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 1 loop_q AS IQC AS loop_t TST RT TST label LB Case 2 skip LB Case 3 multiple iterations Case 4 zero IQC Case 5 multiple So the model covers all

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: produce final POWL structure as PO nodes OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK X LB tau DP D order OR MS etc using textual notation
